rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A FOR ITSELF AND AS SUCCESS VS. IRMA ENCINAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2017, line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 438(f)(2), i.e. this motion was filed 21 days before moving party filed its answer (in fact it was filed 5 days before Plaintiff filed it's operative Second Amended Complaint). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID JARAMILLO ET AL VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 26, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR and SHREE JALARAM HOTEL LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend. As to the first cause of action Plaintiff shall choose and allege only one of the legal remedies available, i.e. either "affirm the contract and sue for fraud" or "rescission." As to the second cause of action Plaintiff shall allege which provision of SFRO was breached and facts in support of each element of this cause of action. As to the third cause of action Plaintiff shall allege facts (not conclusions) regarding breach of duty. As to the fourth cause of action Plaintiff shall attach the contracts allegedly breached. Conclusory allegations currently made fail to meet the standard. = (501/REQ)
